executive_summary_zh: 今日高信号内容集中在 GitHub 将编码代理能力进一步 API 化：Copilot cloud agent 已可通过 REST API 触发、追踪并接入企业内部自动化流程。
对平台与开发效能负责人而言，这意味着 AI coding agent 正从交互式助手演进为可编排的后台执行单元，可用于批量重构、版本发布和 IDP 自助流程。
配套的 Enterprise Installation API 虽然发布体量小，但补齐了 GitHub App 在 enterprise 级发现安装与获取 installation ID 的关键缺口，降低了企业级代理/自动化集成复杂度。
GHES 3.21 RC 本身不是 AI agent 发布，但其中 API 版本演进、组织元数据与规则定向等能力，直接影响企业在本地/混合环境中治理 AI 驱动自动化的可行性。
executive_summary_en: The strongest signal today is GitHub turning coding-agent capability into an API surface: Copilot cloud agent can now be started and tracked via REST.
For platform and engineering leaders, this marks a shift from interactive copilots to orchestratable background agents that can power refactors, release prep, and internal developer portal flows.
The new Enterprise Installation API is a smaller release, but it closes a meaningful gap for enterprise-grade GitHub App integrations by making enterprise installation lookup first-class.

GHES 3.21 RC is not an AI-agent launch per se, but its API versioning, org metadata, and policy targeting features materially affect how enterprises can govern AI-driven automation in hybrid environments.

items.title: Start Copilot cloud agent tasks via the REST API - GitHub Changelog
items.summary_zh: GitHub 为 Copilot Business 与 Enterprise 提供了 Agent tasks REST API（公开预览），允许程序化启动 Copilot cloud agent 任务，并通过 API 查询任务进度。该云端代理在独立开发环境中执行代码修改、验证并最终创建 PR，适合接入企业自动化脚本和内部平台。
items.summary_en: GitHub has launched a public-preview Agent tasks REST API for Copilot Business and Enterprise, allowing teams to programmatically start Copilot cloud agent tasks and track their progress. The cloud agent runs in its own development environment, makes and validates code changes, and opens a pull request, making it fit for enterprise automation and internal platform workflows.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 这是“AI 编码助手”向“可编排软件执行单元”转变的明确信号。过去 Copilot 多数停留在 IDE 交互层；现在平台团队可以把代理能力嵌入批量迁移、跨仓重构、定期发布准备、开发者门户自助创建等流水线中。对于工程组织，这不仅是生产力功能，而是新的自动化原语。
items.why_it_matters_en: This is a clear step from AI coding assistance toward AI agents as orchestratable software execution primitives. Copilot is no longer just an IDE-side interaction model; platform teams can now embed agent execution into fleet-wide migrations, multi-repo refactors, release preparation, and internal developer portal workflows. That makes it strategically relevant, not just a convenience feature.
key_takeaways_zh: Copilot cloud agent 现在可通过 REST API 启动与追踪，适合集成到企业自动化与平台编排系统。
当前支持 PAT 与 OAuth；GitHub App installation token 尚未支持，说明企业级无人工凭证治理仍在完善中。
key_takeaways_en: Copilot cloud agent can now be started and monitored via REST, making it integrable with enterprise automation and platform orchestration systems.
It currently supports PAT and OAuth authentication; lack of GitHub App installation-token support shows that full enterprise-grade unattended auth is still maturing.

items.title: New enterprise installation API now in public preview - GitHub Changelog
items.summary_zh: GitHub 新增 Enterprise Installation API（公开预览），让 GitHub App 能直接查询自己是否安装在某个 enterprise 上以及对应的 installation ID，而不必再遍历所有 installations。该能力与组织、仓库、用户层级现有安装查询 API 对齐。
items.summary_en: GitHub has added a public-preview Enterprise Installation API that lets a GitHub App determine whether it is installed on a given enterprise and retrieve the corresponding installation ID, instead of paginating through all installations. This brings enterprise scope in line with existing org, repo, and user installation lookup APIs.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 这看似是小型 API 补洞，但对企业级代理和开发平台集成非常关键。任何希望以 GitHub App 形式安全接入 enterprise 范围能力的工具——包括代码代理、发布机器人、治理自动化——都能减少发现与鉴权链路复杂度，提高 token 获取效率并降低脚本脆弱性。
items.why_it_matters_en: This looks like a small API-gap closure, but it matters a lot for enterprise-grade agent and platform integrations. Any tool using GitHub Apps for secure enterprise-scope access—including coding agents, release bots, and governance automation—can simplify installation discovery, speed up token acquisition, and reduce brittle pagination-based logic.
key_takeaways_zh: 企业范围的 GitHub App 安装发现终于成为一等 API，减少了通过分页扫描 installations 的低效做法。
它为后续以 GitHub App 身份运行的 AI agent/自动化能力打下更稳固的企业集成基础。
key_takeaways_en: Enterprise-scope GitHub App installation discovery is now a first-class API instead of a pagination workaround.
This strengthens the integration foundation for future AI agents and automation running under GitHub App identity.

items.title: GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 release candidate is available - GitHub Changelog
items.summary_zh: GHES 3.21 RC 发布，重点包括组织自定义属性 GA、可基于元数据自动定向 enterprise rulesets、REST API 版本 2026-03-10、Actions 大型 workflow 页面性能改进，以及 secret scanning 权限和治理增强。
items.summary_en: GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 RC is out, with highlights including GA for organization custom properties, metadata-driven targeting of enterprise rulesets, REST API version 2026-03-10, Actions UI improvements for very large workflows, and stronger secret-scanning permissions and governance controls.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 虽然这不是直接的 AI coding 发布，但它影响企业承载 AI 自动化的控制面：组织属性与规则定向有助于按业务单元分层治理代理使用；新版 API 与大规模 Actions 支持则影响企业在本地或受监管环境中运行自动化、评测和变更流水线的能力。
items.why_it_matters_en: This is not a direct AI-coding launch, but it affects the control plane around AI automation. Organization metadata and targeted rulesets improve policy segmentation for agent usage, while newer APIs and large-workflow support matter for enterprises running automation, evaluation, and change-management pipelines in on-prem or regulated environments.
key_takeaways_zh: 组织自定义属性与 enterprise ruleset 定向能力，可作为 AI 代理治理分层的基础设施。
REST API 版本演进与大规模 Actions 工作流支持，提升了复杂自动化平台在 GHES 上的可运营性。
key_takeaways_en: Organization custom properties and targeted enterprise rulesets can become core infrastructure for tiered AI-agent governance.
REST API evolution and support for very large Actions workflows improve operability for complex automation platforms on GHES.

top_items: Start Copilot cloud agent tasks via the REST API - GitHub Changelog
New enterprise installation API now in public preview - GitHub Changelog
GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 release candidate is available - GitHub Changelog
themes_zh: AI 编码代理从聊天式交互转向可编排 API 服务
企业级鉴权与安装发现正在成为代理平台化的关键底座
治理、规则和元数据分层成为大规模部署 AI 自动化的前提
themes_en: AI coding agents are moving from chat-style interaction to orchestratable API services
Enterprise auth and installation discovery are becoming core infrastructure for agent platforms
Governance, rules, and metadata segmentation are prerequisites for scaled AI automation
implications_zh: 内部开发平台团队应评估是否把代码迁移、依赖升级、发布准备等流程封装为可调用的 agent jobs，而不是只依赖人工触发。
安全与平台团队应优先设计 GitHub App、token 生命周期、审计追踪和 PR 验证链路，因为代理调用面已经开始从 UI 扩展到 API。
在 GHES 或混合环境中的组织，应同步评估 API 版本兼容、ruleset 分层与 Actions 容量，以支撑后续 AI 自动化扩展。
implications_en: Internal developer platform teams should evaluate wrapping migrations, dependency upgrades, and release prep as callable agent jobs instead of purely human-triggered workflows.
Security and platform teams should prioritize GitHub App strategy, token lifecycle management, auditability, and PR validation paths, because agent access is expanding from UI to API.
Organizations on GHES or hybrid setups should review API compatibility, ruleset segmentation, and Actions capacity planning to support future AI automation growth.
reading_order: Start Copilot cloud agent tasks via the REST API - GitHub Changelog
New enterprise installation API now in public preview - GitHub Changelog
GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 release candidate is available - GitHub Changelog
what_to_ignore_zh: 忽略 GitHub Changelog 总索引页，它不提供新增技术信息。
不要把这些更新解读为“代理已经完全企业就绪”：Copilot agent API 仍在 public preview，且 GitHub App installation token 支持尚未到位。
what_to_ignore_en: Ignore the generic GitHub Changelog index page; it contains no incremental technical signal.
Do not overread these releases as meaning agents are fully enterprise-ready yet: the Copilot agent API is still in public preview, and GitHub App installation-token support is not there yet.
